'''Private Luxsub''' was a prosperous business that dealt in the production of personal [[Submarine/Legends|submersible]] transports. The business was located on [[Pavo Prime/Legends|Pavo Prime]] and was in the height of production during the early days of the [[New Republic/Legends|New Republic]].

==Appearances==
*{{InsiderCite|67|The Trouble with Squibs|reprint=1}} {{1st}}
